patterns.spacing: Section py-20 px-8; left-grid gap-x-12 gap-y-10; right-card rounded-2xl shadow-sm
patterns.typography: Inter sans. h2 / heading text-2xl font-bold slate-900; body text-base slate-500 leading-relaxed
conventions: Use next/image for any photographic asset
Icons are small violet tiles (rounded-md, bg-violet-100, p-2)
Right-card link uses pink-500 + arrow glyph
